availability_zones.description: Specifies the list of availability zones for deploying the DAX cluster, ensuring high availability and fault tolerance.

cluster_endpoint_encryption_type.description: Specifies the encryption type for the cluster endpoint; valid values are "NONE" or "TLS".

cluster_name.description: Defines the unique name for the DAX cluster; must be between 1 and 20 characters long and contain only alphanumeric characters or hyphens.

description.description: Provides a brief, user-defined summary of the DAX cluster's purpose or configuration.

iam_role_arn.description: IAM role ARN with permissions required for the DAX cluster to access other AWS resources.

maintenance_window.description: Specifies the time window during which system maintenance can occur, formatted as "ddd:hh:mm-ddd:hh:mm" in UTC; must be within a weekly schedule.

node_type.description: Specifies the compute and memory capacity of each DAX node; must match one of the supported instance types.

notification_topic_arn.description: ARN of the SNS topic for DAX notifications; must be an existing topic.

parameter_group_name.description: Specifies the name of the parameter group associated with the DAX cluster. Must match an existing parameter group.

replication_factor.description: Number of DAX nodes in the cluster, must be between 1 and 10.

security_group_ids.description: List of security group IDs to associate with the DAX cluster for controlling inbound and outbound traffic.

server_side_encryption.description: Enables encryption at rest for the DAX cluster, ensuring data security; must be true or false.

subnet_group_name.description: Specifies the name of the subnet group associated with the DAX cluster; must match an existing subnet group.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to associate with the DAX cluster for categorization or resource organization.

timeouts.description: Defines timeout durations for create, update, and delete operations for the DAX cluster.
